pages.text: By infusing void blocks and slimeballs with sugar and ice, then stirring vigorously over high heat, you obtain this seething purple radiance... Jelly? Those without a resilient constitution will suffer its rebound upon consumption.

pages.title: Ring Packed Void Gel Jelly
pages.text: Fortunately, it merely writhes within your stomach before sucking away all consumed substances.$(br)Grants consumer:$(br)$(li)1-minute Void Resonance and Ravenous V$(li)5-minute Nourishment
